_comment: Caddy SNI-passthrough (M11) demo. ModeTCPPassthrough renders via the caddy-l4 (layer4) app: the edge matches by TLS SNI and proxies the RAW TLS connection to the backend WITHOUT terminating it. caddy_layer4 is a CAPABILITY gate — the edge must be built with github.com/mholt/caddy-l4; without it crenel refuses passthrough loudly. It requires granular_apply so the additive layer4 write never disturbs the http routes / deny / TLS. fake_seed runs against an in-process fake (no real infra). Run: crenel --config examples/settings-caddy-layer4.json --mode passthrough --yes expose vault
